title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first architecture. Agents operate across editor, terminal, and browser to autonomously plan and execute complex end-to-end software development tasks. The platform offers a CLI for developer workflow automation.
